message:
bd-ml2r.3.2: integrate FNX diagnostics into CLI validate

- Add collect_fnx_diagnostics() function that converts FNX analysis
  results to ValidationDiagnostic records with proper severity mapping
- Add FNX summary fields to ValidateResult (component_count,
  is_connected, articulation_point_count, bridge_count, cycle_count)
- Conditionally enabled via fnx-integration feature flag
- All fields use skip_serializing_if for backward-compatible JSON output
- Diagnostics include stage="fnx" and machine-readable error codes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
